perturbation.original_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing, VET TECH may, at its election, bill the client directly for COOL TECH Services and under such circumstances COOL TECH shall bill VET TECH the pre-agreed amount for the engagement as adjusted by any client-approved change orders. For any Government Sales brought by VET TECH COOL TECH agrees to be held to the same billing and payment terms as is dictated under the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) guidelines and requirements; otherwise, COOL TECH will bill the client directly.
perturbation.changed_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing, VET TECH may, at its election, bill the client directly for COOL TECH Services and under such circumstances COOL TECH shall bill VET TECH the pre-agreed amount for the engagement as adjusted by any client-approved change orders. For any Government Sales brought by VET TECH COOL TECH agrees to be held to the same billing and payment terms, with payment due 60 days from invoice receipt, as is dictated under the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) guidelines and requirements; otherwise, COOL TECH will bill the client directly.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a conflict in payment terms. By specifying 'payment due 60 days from invoice receipt' for Government Sales within the section describing billing for COOL TECH services, it could contradict potential payment terms outlined in other sections or addenda relating to general payment schedules between COOL TECH and VET TECH. This creates uncertainty regarding which payment terms apply to Government Sales.
perturbation.location: ARTICLE I. SCOPE OF STRATEGIC ALLIANCE. A.
perturbation.contradicted_location: ARTICLE I. SCOPE OF STRATEGIC ALLIANCE. B.
perturbation.contradicted_text: VET TECH shall, in a professional manner, take all steps necessary to market and perform its business management consulting, GAIT Software and other AI services (collectively the "VET TECH Services") for clients referred to VET TECH by COOL TECH. Any engagement to perform VET TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as VET TECH may approve in its sole discretion. VET TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all VET TECH Services or a joint VET TECH/COOL TECH team. VET TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all VET TECH Services or with VET TECH/COOL TECH approved team. Notwithstanding the foregoing, COOL TECH may, at its election, bill the client directly for VET TECH Services and under such circumstances VET TECH shall bill COOL TECH the pre-agreed amount for the engagement as adjusted by any client-approved change orders; otherwise, VET TECH will bill the client directly. COOL TECH agrees to include reference to VET TECH in each contract and proposal involving VET TECH Services. VET TECH's GAIT Software and other AI services (collectively the "VET TECH Services"), and other proprietary information and associated products, copyrights, trademarks, trade names and logos developed by VET TECH shall remain the property of VET TECH and reference to VET TECH's rights shall be made in all uses of such materials in at least 12 point type.
perturbation.justification: The changed text specifies 'payment due 60 days from invoice receipt' for Government Sales brought by VET TECH, which directly contradicts the original clause stating that 'Any engagement to perform VET TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as VET TECH may approve in its sole discretion.' This creates a conflict because the 60-day payment term is now explicitly dictated, overriding VET TECH's discretion in setting the payment terms for VET TECH Services, thus creating an inconsistency as defined in the Perturbation Definitions.

perturbation.original_text: Any engagement to perform COOL TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as COOL TECH may approve at its sole discretion. COOL TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all COOL TECH Services or with COOL TECH/VET TECH approved team.
perturbation.changed_text: Any engagement to perform COOL TECH Services for Commercial Clients shall be on such terms and conditions as COOL TECH may approve at its sole discretion. However, for Government Clients, engagements shall be subject to the approval of both COOL TECH and VET TECH. COOL TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all COOL TECH Services or with COOL TECH/VET TECH approved team.
perturbation.explanation: By introducing different approval processes for COOL TECH Services based on client type (Commercial vs. Government), this creates an in-text contradiction if Article III states that COOL TECH is ultimately responsible for the provision of their services, it is a contradiction to also say that VET TECH needs to approve the engagements.
perturbation.location: ARTICLE I. SCOPE OF STRATEGIC ALLIANCE. A.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party shall designate a partner, officer or other senior person to be responsible for the overall administration of this Agreement. VET TECH shall have ultimate responsibility for client relationships for those clients that it elects to bill directly for COOL TECH Services and COOL TECH will respond to VET TECH's direction.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that COOL TECH has sole discretion over the terms and conditions for COOL TECH Services. The changed text introduces a different approval process for Government Clients, requiring VET TECH's approval as well, contradicting the original statement of COOL TECH's sole discretion. This contradicts the text stating "VET TECH shall have ultimate responsibility for client relationships for those clients that it elects to bill directly for COOL TECH Services and COOL TECH will respond to VET TECH's direction". This creates an inconsistency regarding responsibility and approval processes.

perturbation.original_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement shall be earlier terminated (x) by mutual agreement of the parties, or (y) at any time upon sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party.
perturbation.changed_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement shall be earlier terminated (x) by mutual agreement of the parties, or (y) by COOL TECH only at any time upon sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party.
perturbation.explanation: This creates an in-text contradiction, the original text allowed for agreement termination by either party. The updated text only allows COOL TECH to terminate the agreement. This creates an in-text contradiction because it does not allow VET TECH to terminate the agreement after giving sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall be effective as of the date first set forth above and, shall expire on the later of (i) five (5) years from the date hereof, or (ii) with respect to any projects identified in any contract for which VET TECH is billing the client directly, upon the completion of COOL TECH's Services and receipt of payment by COOL TECH from VET TECH for said services. This Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least thirty (30) days prior to the date of expiration. Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement shall be earlier terminated (x) by mutual agreement of the parties, or (y) by COOL TECH only at any time upon sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party. Time is of the essence in this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text allows either party to terminate the agreement with sixty (60) days' notice. The changed text restricts this right only to COOL TECH. This directly contradicts the portion of the contradicted text that states the agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination, as now only COOL TECH can terminate under the modified clause. This creates a clear and direct conflict in the agreement.
